title: SUSTAINABLE AND COST-EFFECTIVE PRODUCTION PROCESS FOR THE UPCYCLING OF OLIVE
description: A demonstration project to develop an integrated biorefinery for recovering valuable biomolecules from olive and other plant-based food by-products and converting them into sustainable, high-value ingredients for nutraceutical and cosmetic markets. The document outlines objectives including process optimization, scale-up, validation, and market readiness, as well as consortium partners and project funding details.
